generated.description: This is an autogenerated partial class definition of 'Constringence'

description*.en: In optics and lens design, constringence of a transparent material, also known as the Abbe number or the V-number, is an approximate measure of the material's dispersion (change of refractive index versus wavelength), with high values of V indicating low dispersion.

title: Constringence
description: In optics and lens design, constringence of a transparent material, also known as the Abbe number or the V-number, is an approximate measure of the material's dispersion (change of refractive index versus wavelength), with high values of V indicating low dispersion.
